response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development experience and expertise in modern web technologies, but his background lacks depth in the core C++ and industrial automation requirements for this role. His recent work at Stripe and Shopify does not align closely with the job's technical demands, though his earlier experience with C/C++ at National Instruments and DLang for low-latency systems shows relevant skills. Security and industrial cybersecurity experience is not evident.
strengths: Extensive experience with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic, C/C++ at National Instruments).
Strong background in software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies.
Demonstrated ability to mentor teams and contribute to technical documentation and open-source projects.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (last significant role was in 2015), raising questions about current proficiency.
No evident experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL).
Most recent roles focus on full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which is not aligned with the role's core requirements.
